description:
Integrate the MDI workflow pieces needed for refills and ongoing care access at launch.

**Scope**
- Confirm whether refill cadence/subscription lifecycle is driven by MDI APIs, embedded URLs, webhooks, or manual MDI workflow.
- Implement only the launch-required helpers and status mirrors.
- Keep Stripe billing state and MDI care workflow state linked by opaque IDs, not clinical descriptors.

**Acceptance**
- Product can explain what a patient can do for refills or follow-up from the dashboard.
- Any MDI lifecycle helper has idempotency and tests.
- No local record becomes the clinical source of truth.
title: MDI refill/care workflow lifecycle integration
